title: Koellia clinopodioides
taxonomy: Koellia clinopodioides is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. It is an annual or perennial herb that grows in dry to moist areas. The classification of Koellia clinopodioides includes its kingdom as Plantae, phylum as Magnoliophyta, class as Magnoliopsida, and order as Caryophyllales. The plant is native to Western Australia, where it is found in various regions, including the southwestern and southeastern parts of the state. Further classification may include the family as Caryophyllaceae and the genus as Koellia.
